subtopics.name: Scale Economies & Barriers
subtopics.focus: How scale economies act as barriers to entry, benefit-barrier matrix, and cost advantages.

subtopics.name: Network Economies & Feedback Loops
subtopics.focus: Direct and indirect network effects, platform value curves, and switching costs.

subtopics.name: Counter-Positioning & Business Model Innovation
subtopics.focus: Netflix vs Blockbuster case, incumbent dilemma, and business model disruption.

subtopics.name: Cornered Resources & Process Power
subtopics.focus: Securing key talent/assets, organizational capability as a moat, and branding power.

subtopics.name: Threat of New Entrants & Entry Barriers
subtopics.focus: Capital requirements, regulatory hurdles, switching costs, and distribution access.

subtopics.name: Bargaining Power of Buyers & Suppliers
subtopics.focus: Concentration ratios, switching costs, backward integration, and substitute availability.

subtopics.name: Threat of Substitutes & Rivalry Intensity
subtopics.focus: Price-performance tradeoffs, industry growth rate, exit barriers, and fixed cost structure.

subtopics.name: Strategic Groups & Value Chain Positioning
subtopics.focus: Mapping competitors, identifying niches, and value chain integration/disintegration.

subtopics.name: Sustaining vs Disruptive Innovation
subtopics.focus: Performance trajectory, mainstream customer needs, and technological progress.

subtopics.name: Low-end vs New-market Disruption
subtopics.focus: Targeting overserved customers vs creating new consumption contexts.

subtopics.name: Resource Allocation & Profit Margin Constraints
subtopics.focus: Why successful firms ignore low-margin markets due to structural constraints.

subtopics.name: Incumbent Defense & Spin-offs
subtopics.focus: Creating autonomous business units, managing dual strategies, and target customers.

subtopics.name: Two-Sided Markets & Cross-Side Effects
subtopics.focus: Cross-side network effects, subsidizing one side, and price sensitivity.

subtopics.name: Critical Mass & Chicken-and-Egg Solutions
subtopics.focus: Strategies to seed initial supply/demand, marquee users, and bootstrapping.

subtopics.name: Platform Leaks & Multi-Homing Costs
subtopics.focus: Preventing transactions outside the platform, reducing multi-homing incentives.

subtopics.name: Ecosystem Governance & API Controls
subtopics.focus: Balancing open innovation with control, developer policies, and tax rates.

subtopics.name: Value Innovation & Cost-Value Tradeoff
subtopics.focus: Breaking the cost-value tradeoff, creating uncontested market space.

subtopics.name: The Four Actions Framework (ERRC)
subtopics.focus: Eliminate, Reduce, Raise, and Create grid and value innovation.

subtopics.name: Strategy Canvas & Value Curves
subtopics.focus: Drawing and analyzing strategy curves, divergence, and compelling taglines.

subtopics.name: Red Ocean vs Blue Ocean Strategy
subtopics.focus: Structuralist vs reconstructionist view, market boundary definitions.

subtopics.name: Horizon 1: Core Business Operations
subtopics.focus: Defending and extending the core business, operational efficiency, and metrics.

subtopics.name: Horizon 2: Emerging Businesses
subtopics.focus: Scaling up new product lines, business models, and securing growth capital.

subtopics.name: Horizon 3: Future Options & R&D
subtopics.focus: Exploring disruptive technologies, seed investments, and long-term bets.

subtopics.name: Resource Allocation and Horizon Balance
subtopics.focus: Balancing people, capital, and focus across H1, H2, and H3 projects.

subtopics.name: Fixed-Cost Leverage & Breakeven
subtopics.focus: Operating leverage, fixed vs variable cost structure, and volume-driven margins.

subtopics.name: Experience Curves & Learning Rates
subtopics.focus: Unit cost reduction with cumulative volume, process optimization, and learning curve formulas.

subtopics.name: Purchasing Power & Monopsony
subtopics.focus: Volume discounts, supply chain dominance, and buyer concentration advantages.

subtopics.name: Minimum Efficient Scale (MES)
subtopics.focus: Locating optimal production scale to avoid diseconomies of scale.

subtopics.name: Buy vs Build Framework
subtopics.focus: Core competencies, speed-to-market, integration risk, and transaction costs.

subtopics.name: Revenue vs Cost Synergies
subtopics.focus: Cross-selling, market power vs headcount reduction, facilities consolidation.

subtopics.name: Post-Merger Integration (PMI) Risks
subtopics.focus: Cultural clashes, system incompatibilities, customer churn, and retaining key talent.

subtopics.name: Due Diligence & Valuation in Acquisitions
subtopics.focus: Assessing assets, liabilities, synergies, and determining purchase price premium.

subtopics.name: Strategic Alliances & Joint Ventures
subtopics.focus: Resource sharing, risk mitigation, legal structure, and alignment of incentives.

subtopics.name: Co-opetition: Competing and Cooperating
subtopics.focus: Creating the pie vs dividing the pie, collaborating on standards, competing on products.

subtopics.name: Ecosystem Alliances & Android Case
subtopics.focus: Open-source strategy to capture platform volume and defeat closed competitors.

subtopics.name: Value Capture in Value Networks
subtopics.focus: Bottlenecks, bargaining power in multi-partner ecosystems, and strategic positioning.

subtopics.name: Technology Adoption Life Cycle (TALC)
subtopics.focus: Innovators, early adopters, early majority, late majority, and laggards.

subtopics.name: The Chasm: Early Adopters to Early Majority
subtopics.focus: The gap between visionaries and pragmatists, and why tech startups fail here.

subtopics.name: Bowling Alley & Beachhead Segment Strategy
subtopics.focus: Targeting a specific niche, solving total product needs, and adjacent markets.

subtopics.name: Tornado & Main Street Scaling
subtopics.focus: Handling hyper-growth, expanding capacity, and driving product simplification.

subtopics.name: Customer Lifetime Value (LTV) Formula
subtopics.focus: LTV = (ARPU * Gross Margin) / Churn Rate, and time-discounted cash flows.

subtopics.name: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) Calculation
subtopics.focus: CAC = Total Sales & Marketing Spend / Customers Acquired, and attribution challenges.

subtopics.name: LTV:CAC Ratio Benchmarks
subtopics.focus: 3:1 standard, meaning of < 3:1 (inefficient growth) vs > 5:1 (underinvesting in growth).

subtopics.name: CAC Payback Period & Cash Flow
subtopics.focus: Payback Period = CAC / (ARPU * Gross Margin), impact on working capital runway.

subtopics.name: Customer Churn vs Revenue Churn
subtopics.focus: Logo churn (number of customers) vs Gross Revenue Churn (lost ARR/MRR).

subtopics.name: Net Revenue Retention (NRR) Formula
subtopics.focus: NRR = (Starting ARR + Expansion + Upgrades - Churn - Contraction) / Starting ARR.

subtopics.name: Gross Revenue Retention (GRR)
subtopics.focus: GRR = (Starting ARR - Churn - Contraction) / Starting ARR, capped at 100%.

subtopics.name: Net Negative Churn Mechanics
subtopics.focus: When expansion revenue from existing customers exceeds lost revenue from churned customers.

subtopics.name: North Star Metric (NSM) Definition
subtopics.focus: The single metric that best captures the core value product delivers to customers.

subtopics.name: Input vs Output Metrics
subtopics.focus: Output metrics (revenue, churn) are lagging; input metrics (active users, actions) are leading.

subtopics.name: Proxy Metrics for Engagement
subtopics.focus: DAU/MAU ratio, session duration, and feature adoption rates as leading indicators.

subtopics.name: Aligning Metrics with Strategy
subtopics.focus: How a company aligns product telemetry with company-wide strategic OKRs.

subtopics.name: Cohort Analysis Methodology
subtopics.focus: Grouping users by acquisition date (vintage) and tracking behavior over time.

subtopics.name: Retention Curves & Asymptotes
subtopics.focus: Visualizing retention decay, locating the retention plateau to confirm PMF.

subtopics.name: Smile Curves & Re-engagement
subtopics.focus: U-shaped retention curves indicating successful reactivation and network effects.

subtopics.name: Cohort-based Revenue Projection
subtopics.focus: Predicting future cash flow based on vintage retention characteristics.

subtopics.name: The Rule of 40 (Growth + Profit)
subtopics.focus: YoY Growth Rate + EBITDA Margin >= 40% for healthy, efficient scale-ups.

subtopics.name: Burn Multiple & Capital Efficiency
subtopics.focus: Burn Multiple = Net Burn / Net New ARR, assessing capital efficiency.

subtopics.name: LTV:CAC Payback Optimization
subtopics.focus: Strategies to reduce CAC (SEO, virality) or increase LTV (pricing power, expansion).

subtopics.name: SaaS Magic Number (Sales Efficiency)
subtopics.focus: Magic Number = (Quarterly Net New ARR * 4) / Previous Quarter S&M Expense.

subtopics.name: Average Revenue Per User (ARPU)
subtopics.focus: ARPU = Total Revenue / Total Active Users, ARPU variations by segment.

subtopics.name: Expansion Revenue: Upselling & Cross-selling
subtopics.focus: Driving additional revenue from existing customers via premium features or seats.

subtopics.name: Seat-based vs Usage-based Expansion
subtopics.focus: Comparing flat subscription seats vs pay-as-you-go consumption scaling.

subtopics.name: Tiered Pricing Strategies
subtopics.focus: Designing Good/Better/Best tiers, aligning value metrics with customer segments.

subtopics.name: Gross Margin & COGS in Software
subtopics.focus: Hosting costs, customer support, third-party APIs, and standard SaaS benchmarks (80%+).

subtopics.name: Contribution Margin vs Gross Margin
subtopics.focus: Revenue minus variable costs, mapping product-line profitability.

subtopics.name: Operating Margin & EBITDA
subtopics.focus: Operating profit after R&D, S&M, G&A; path to profitability.

subtopics.name: Scale and Gross Margin Improvements
subtopics.focus: Infrastructure optimization, self-service support, and economies of scale.

subtopics.name: ARR and MRR Calculations
subtopics.focus: Annualized Recurring Revenue, Monthly Recurring Revenue, excluding one-time fees.

subtopics.name: Billings vs Bookings vs Revenue
subtopics.focus: Bookings (contract value), Billings (cash invoiced), Revenue (recognized over time).

subtopics.name: Deferred Revenue & GAAP Accounting
subtopics.focus: Liability on balance sheet representing cash received for services not yet delivered.

subtopics.name: Churn and ARR Bridge Analysis
subtopics.focus: Visualizing ARR growth components: New, Expansion, Churn, Contraction.

subtopics.name: Net Promoter Score (NPS) Mechanics
subtopics.focus: NPS = % Promoters (9-10) - % Detractors (0-6), and strategic usage.

subtopics.name: Customer Effort Score (CES)
subtopics.focus: Ease of service interaction, correlation with customer loyalty and churn.

subtopics.name: Customer Health Score Modeling
subtopics.focus: Combining usage logs, support tickets, and NPS to predict churn risk.

subtopics.name: Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) vs Retention
subtopics.focus: Transactional satisfaction survey vs long-term contractual retention.

subtopics.name: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
subtopics.focus: Funnel drops, A/B testing checkout pages, and friction reduction.

subtopics.name: Bounce Rate & CTR Optimization
subtopics.focus: Ad click-through rate, landing page relevance, and user intent match.

subtopics.name: CAC by Channel (Paid vs Organic)
subtopics.focus: Comparing SEO/content GTM efficiency vs PPC/ads search engine marketing.

subtopics.name: Viral Coefficient (K-factor)
subtopics.focus: K = Number of invites sent * conversion rate, virality growth loop threshold (K > 1).

subtopics.name: OKR History (Grove & Doerr)
subtopics.focus: MBO evolution, Intel's execution style, John Doerr bringing OKRs to Google.

subtopics.name: Objectives vs Key Results
subtopics.focus: Qualitative, inspiring Objectives vs quantitative, measurable Key Results.

subtopics.name: OKR Grading & Execution Cycles
subtopics.focus: 0.0 to 1.0 scoring, quarterly check-in rhythms, and grading transparency.

subtopics.name: Committed vs Aspirational OKRs
subtopics.focus: Predictable 100% goals vs high-risk, high-impact 70% stretch goals.

subtopics.name: Scrum Roles (PO, SM, Dev)
subtopics.focus: Product Owner priorities, Scrum Master facilitation, Dev Team self-organization.

subtopics.name: Sprint Ceremonies & Rhythm
subtopics.focus: Planning, Standups, Review (Demo), and Retrospective feedback loop.

subtopics.name: Product Backlog Grooming & Story Points
subtopics.focus: User stories, estimating effort using Fibonacci sequences, prioritizing backlogs.

subtopics.name: Agile Velocity & Burn-down Charts
subtopics.focus: Tracking team velocity, projecting release dates, and sprint health visualization.

subtopics.name: Sean Ellis Test (40% Rule)
subtopics.focus: Surveying users: 'How disappointed would you be if product disappeared?' Target >= 40% very disappointed.

subtopics.name: PMF Surveying & Qualitative Feedback
subtopics.focus: Combining user survey data with usage logs to identify product value hook.

subtopics.name: PMF Indicators: Retention Plateau
subtopics.focus: Flat cohort retention curve over time as the absolute signal of product-market fit.

subtopics.name: MVP Iterations & Pivots
subtopics.focus: Validating hypotheses, lean startup cycles, and changing strategy without changing vision.

subtopics.name: RICE Prioritization Framework
subtopics.focus: RICE Score = (Reach * Impact * Confidence) / Effort, removing personal bias.

subtopics.name: MoSCoW Prioritization Technique
subtopics.focus: Must have, Should have, Could have, Won't have (for this release cycle).

subtopics.name: Kano Model: Delighters vs Basics
subtopics.focus: Classifying features into Basic, Performance, and Excitement/Delighters attributes.

subtopics.name: User Story Mapping & Roadmaps
subtopics.focus: Mapping user journey tasks, dividing into release slices, and roadmap communication.

subtopics.name: Acquisition & Activation Tactics
subtopics.focus: First-user experience (Aha! moment), signup friction reduction, and channel fit.

subtopics.name: Retention: Habit Formation Loops
subtopics.focus: Hook model: Trigger, Action, Variable Reward, Investment, driving LTV.

subtopics.name: Referral: Viral Loops & Incentives
subtopics.focus: Double-sided referrals (e.g. Dropbox free space), organic share loops.

subtopics.name: Revenue Optimization: Pricing & Upgrades
subtopics.focus: Paywall positioning, purchase path optimization, and payment friction removal.

subtopics.name: Fixed vs Variable Cost Leverage
subtopics.focus: Building operational leverage by keeping variable costs low relative to sales growth.

subtopics.name: Scaling Processes via Automation
subtopics.focus: Automating workflows, reducing manual operations, and process optimization.

subtopics.name: Outsourcing vs In-sourcing Framework
subtopics.focus: Core vs non-core activities, cost analysis, and strategic risk management.

subtopics.name: Headcount Scaling vs Output Scaling
subtopics.focus: S-curves in headcount growth, maintaining efficiency and avoiding bloated payrolls.

subtopics.name: Continuous Integration/Deployment (CI/CD)
subtopics.focus: Automating software build, test, and release pipeline, trunk-based development.

subtopics.name: DORA Metrics
subtopics.focus: Deployment Frequency, Lead Time for Changes, Mean Time to Recovery, Change Failure Rate.

subtopics.name: Infrastructure as Code & Systems
subtopics.focus: Version controlling infrastructure, automated server configuration, and immutability.

subtopics.name: SRE Principles & Error Budgets
subtopics.focus: Site Reliability Engineering, error budgets, balancing velocity with platform stability.

subtopics.name: Conway's Law
subtopics.focus: Software architecture mirrors the communication structure of the organization.

subtopics.name: Psychological Safety & High-Performing Teams
subtopics.focus: Google's Project Aristotle findings, vulnerability, and team collaboration.

subtopics.name: Matrix Organizations vs Cross-functional
subtopics.focus: Functional reporting vs product squads, advantages and coordination costs.

subtopics.name: Kotter's 8-Step Change Model
subtopics.focus: Urgency, coalition, vision, communication, empowering action, short-term wins, sustaining growth.

subtopics.name: Empathy Mapping & User Journeys
subtopics.focus: Say/Think/Do/Feel grid, documenting user touchpoints, and friction mapping.

subtopics.name: Double Diamond Process
subtopics.focus: Discover and Define (divergence/convergence) -> Develop and Deliver (divergence/convergence).

subtopics.name: Usability Testing Methods
subtopics.focus: Think-aloud protocols, task completion rates, and cognitive walkthroughs.

subtopics.name: Prototype-led Ideation
subtopics.focus: Low-fidelity wireframes vs high-fidelity mockups, rapid prototyping cycles.

subtopics.name: Blameless Postmortems & Retrospectives
subtopics.focus: Focusing on systemic fixes rather than human error, learning from failures.

subtopics.name: Five Whys Root Cause Analysis
subtopics.focus: Iterative interrogation to find the systemic flaw, corrective action plans.

subtopics.name: SLAs, SLOs, and Error Budgets
subtopics.focus: Service Level Agreement (legal contract) vs Service Level Objective (internal target).

subtopics.name: Escalation Paths & On-Call Rotation
subtopics.focus: PagerDuty rotations, runbooks, and incident commander roles.

subtopics.name: Income Statement: Revenue to Net Income
subtopics.focus: COGS, Gross Profit, Operating Expenses (OpEx), Operating Income (EBIT), Taxes, Net Income.

subtopics.name: Balance Sheet: Assets, Liabilities, Equity
subtopics.focus: Current vs non-current assets/liabilities, working capital, shareholder equity, Accounting Equation (A = L + SE).

subtopics.name: Cash Flow Statement: Operating, Investing, Financing
subtopics.focus: Indirect method: Net Income to Cash from Operations, CapEx in investing, debt/equity in financing.

subtopics.name: Dynamic Links Across Three Statements
subtopics.focus: Net Income feeds retained earnings; CapEx feeds PP&E and cash flow; debt issuance feeds cash and liabilities.

subtopics.name: Free Cash Flow to Firm (FCFF)
subtopics.focus: FCFF = EBIT * (1 - Tax Rate) + D&A - CapEx - Change in Working Capital, firm valuation base.

subtopics.name: Free Cash Flow to Equity (FCFE)
subtopics.focus: FCFE = Cash from Operations - CapEx + Net Borrowing, equity valuation base.

subtopics.name: Operating Cash Flow vs EBITDA
subtopics.focus: EBITDA ignores cash tax, cash interest, and changes in working capital; cash flow includes them.

subtopics.name: Capital Expenditures (CapEx) & Depreciation
subtopics.focus: Maintenance vs growth CapEx, tax depreciation vs book depreciation.

subtopics.name: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF)
subtopics.focus: Projecting cash flows, discounting using WACC, calculating terminal value.

subtopics.name: Comparable Companies Analysis (Comps)
subtopics.focus: Selecting peer group, calculating EV/EBITDA, EV/Sales, P/E multiples, applying discount/premium.

subtopics.name: Precedent Transactions Analysis
subtopics.focus: Analyzing historical M&A deals, tracking control premiums, transaction multiples.

subtopics.name: Terminal Value Calculations
subtopics.focus: Gordon Growth Method vs Exit Multiple Method, sensitivity tables.

subtopics.name: EBITDA Definition & Rationale
subtopics.focus: Proxy for operating profitability, eliminating capital structure, tax, and non-cash accounting differences.

subtopics.name: EBITDA Margin Analysis
subtopics.focus: EBITDA / Revenue, comparative analysis of operating efficiency across competitors.

subtopics.name: EBITDA-to-FCF Reconciliation
subtopics.focus: Converting accounting accrual proxy EBITDA into actual cash flow.

subtopics.name: Adjusted EBITDA & Non-GAAP Metrics
subtopics.focus: Stripping out stock-based compensation, restructuring charges, and one-off costs.

subtopics.name: Net Present Value (NPV) Decision Rule
subtopics.focus: Discounting cash inflows and outflows, NPV > 0 rule, NPV profile.

subtopics.name: Internal Rate of Return (IRR) Calculations
subtopics.focus: The discount rate where NPV = 0, multiple IRR problem, comparing IRR to Hurdle Rate.

subtopics.name: Payback Period & Discounted Payback
subtopics.focus: Time to recover initial investment, drawbacks of ignoring cash flows after payback.

subtopics.name: Hurdle Rate & Capital Allocation
subtopics.focus: Determining minimum acceptable return, capital rationing, and portfolio prioritization.

subtopics.name: Cost of Debt & After-Tax Cost
subtopics.focus: Yield to maturity on debt, tax shield benefits, after-tax cost formula: Rd * (1 - T).

subtopics.name: CAPM for Cost of Equity
subtopics.focus: CAPM: Re = Rf + Beta * (Rm - Rf), risk-free rate, beta coefficient, market risk premium.

subtopics.name: Weighted Average Cost of Capital (WACC)
subtopics.focus: WACC = (E/V * Re) + (D/V * Rd * (1 - T)), calculating optimal cost of capital.

subtopics.name: Debt vs Equity Financing Tradeoffs
subtopics.focus: Bankruptcy costs, agency costs, financial leverage benefits, dilution tradeoffs.

subtopics.name: Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)
subtopics.focus: DSO = (Accounts Receivable / Credit Sales) * 365, managing collections efficiency.

subtopics.name: Days Payable Outstanding (DPO)
subtopics.focus: DPO = (Accounts Payable / Cost of Goods Sold) * 365, stretching payables without damaging vendor relations.

subtopics.name: Days Inventory Outstanding (DIO)
subtopics.focus: DIO = (Average Inventory / COGS) * 365, inventory turnover, warehouse costs.

subtopics.name: Cash Conversion Cycle (CCC)
subtopics.focus: CCC = DIO + DSO - DPO, calculating net cash cycle efficiency.

subtopics.name: Pre-money vs Post-money Valuation
subtopics.focus: Post-money = Pre-money + Investment, share price = Pre-money / Pre-money shares.

subtopics.name: Dilution & Option Pool Shuffle
subtopics.focus: New shares issued, dilution formula, employee option pool creation impact.

subtopics.name: Liquidation Preferences
subtopics.focus: Participating (double dip) vs non-participating, liquidation multiples, exit waterfalls.

subtopics.name: Vesting Schedules & Acceleration Clauses
subtopics.focus: 4-year vesting, 1-year cliff, single-trigger vs double-trigger acceleration upon acquisition.

subtopics.name: Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX) Compliance
subtopics.focus: Section 404 audit, executive accountability, internal controls validation, penalties.

subtopics.name: Internal Controls & Segregation of Duties
subtopics.focus: Authorization, recording, custody separation, preventing fraud, audit trails.

subtopics.name: Revenue Recognition (ASC 606)
subtopics.focus: Five-step model: identify contract, performance obligations, transaction price, allocation, recognized timing.

subtopics.name: Audit Committee Role
subtopics.focus: Independent board members, oversight of external auditors, internal audit reporting.

subtopics.name: S-1 Registration Statement
subtopics.focus: Prospectus, business description, risk factors, financial disclosures, registration with SEC.

subtopics.name: Underwriting Process & Roadshow
subtopics.focus: Bookbuilding, underwriter spread, pricing meetings, institutional investor pitch.

subtopics.name: Direct Listings vs SPACs vs IPOs
subtopics.focus: Comparing traditional IPO, direct listing (no new capital, no lockup), and SPAC mergers.

subtopics.name: Quiet Period & Lock-up Period
subtopics.focus: SEC quiet period regulations, lock-up agreements (usually 180 days) for insiders.

subtopics.name: Direct vs Indirect Sales Channels
subtopics.focus: In-house sales representatives vs distributors, value-added resellers (VARs), and brokers.

subtopics.name: Channel Partnerships & Distribution
subtopics.focus: Co-selling, referral fees, channel conflict management, distributor margin allocation.

subtopics.name: Product-Led Growth (PLG) Strategy
subtopics.focus: Self-service signups, product usage as user acquisition driver, freemium conversion loops.

subtopics.name: Sales-Led Growth (SLG) Strategy
subtopics.focus: Enterprise outbound sales, account executives, high contract values (ACV), multi-level buyer mapping.

subtopics.name: Lead Generation & MQL Criteria
subtopics.focus: Marketing Qualified Lead, demographic scoring, intent data, and lead handoff to sales.

subtopics.name: Sales Qualified Lead (SQL) & BANT
subtopics.focus: SQL qualification criteria, BANT (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline) framework.

subtopics.name: Pipeline Coverage Ratio
subtopics.focus: Pipeline Value / Quota Target, win-rate multiplier, standard 3x-4x ratio.

subtopics.name: Sales Velocity Equation
subtopics.focus: Velocity = (Opportunities * Win Rate * Deal Size) / Cycle Time, leverage points.

subtopics.name: Metrics & Economic Buyer
subtopics.focus: Identifying ROI numbers needed, mapping and access to the ultimate decision-maker.

subtopics.name: Decision Criteria & Decision Process
subtopics.focus: Technical/commercial criteria, steps to reach contract approval, purchasing committees.

subtopics.name: Paper Process & Identify Pain
subtopics.focus: Legal review, security forms, master services agreement (MSA), quantifying cost of inaction (COI).

subtopics.name: Champion & Competition Analysis
subtopics.focus: Cultivating internal advocates, identifying rival solutions, mapping strengths/weaknesses.

subtopics.name: Situation & Problem Questions
subtopics.focus: Gathering background facts, identifying prospect's difficulties, challenges, or dissatisfactions.

subtopics.name: Implication Questions (Building Pain)
subtopics.focus: Linking problems to their financial/operational consequences, raising urgency.

subtopics.name: Need-payoff Questions (Value Confirmation)
subtopics.focus: Getting customer to describe the value of a solution, active recall of benefits.

subtopics.name: SPIN in Enterprise Sales
subtopics.focus: Avoiding premature solutions, managing large contracts, building trust with senior buyers.

subtopics.name: Return on Investment (ROI) Modeling
subtopics.focus: Calculating cost savings, efficiency gains, and payback time, build ROI calculator.

subtopics.name: Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Comparison
subtopics.focus: Acquisition cost + implementation + support + training vs competitor solutions.

subtopics.name: Selling Value vs Selling Features
subtopics.focus: Translating product features into business benefits (revenue increase, risk mitigation, cost reduction).

subtopics.name: Business Case Creation for Executives
subtopics.focus: Writing executive summaries, aligning solution with strategic executive goals.

subtopics.name: Quota Setting & Attainment
subtopics.focus: Top-down vs bottom-up quotas, territory planning, average attainment rates (50-60% target).

subtopics.name: On-Target Earnings (OTE) & Base-to-Variable
subtopics.focus: Fixed salary vs commission variable split (e.g. 50/50 OTE), market rate comparisons.

subtopics.name: Accelerators, Decelerators, & Caps
subtopics.focus: Commission multipliers for exceeding 100% quota, penalty rates, and commission caps.

subtopics.name: Clawbacks & Deal Governance
subtopics.focus: Reclaiming commission if customer churns early, deal review boards, contract compliance.

subtopics.name: BATNA (Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement)
subtopics.focus: Determining walkaway point, evaluating alternatives, improving leverage.

subtopics.name: ZOPA (Zone of Possible Agreement)
subtopics.focus: Seller's reservation price vs buyer's ceiling, bargaining range optimization.

subtopics.name: Concession Management
subtopics.focus: Trading concessions (value-for-value), documenting agreements, avoiding unreciprocated discounts.

subtopics.name: Procurement and Legal Hurdles
subtopics.focus: Redlines in agreements, liability limits, indemnification, payment terms negotiation.

subtopics.name: Sales Playbooks & Collateral Strategy
subtopics.focus: Standardizing objection handling, product pitching scripts, buyer persona guides.

subtopics.name: Training & Onboarding Acceleration
subtopics.focus: Time-to-first-deal reduction, product certification for sales hires, roleplay loops.

subtopics.name: Sales Tech Stack Optimization
subtopics.focus: CRM (Salesforce/HubSpot), outbound sequences, intelligence tools, data enrichment.

subtopics.name: Competitive Intelligence Briefs
subtopics.focus: Battlecards, feature comparisons, pricing updates, competitor weaknesses mapping.

subtopics.name: Account Management & Expansion
subtopics.focus: Identifying cross-sell opportunities, renewal timelines, account planning.

subtopics.name: Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs)
subtopics.focus: Confirming ROI delivered, sharing product roadmaps, aligning future goals with client executives.

subtopics.name: Customer Health Score & Renewal Risk
subtopics.focus: Red/Yellow/Green health status tracking, proactively managing risk accounts.

subtopics.name: Time to Value (TTV) Optimization
subtopics.focus: Speeding onboarding, training cycles, reducing client time to first value hook.

subtopics.name: Value-based Pricing vs Cost-plus Pricing
subtopics.focus: Pricing based on customer willingness to pay / value created vs production cost markup.

subtopics.name: Price Elasticity of Demand
subtopics.focus: Calculating % change in volume / % change in price, revenue impact of price adjustments.

subtopics.name: Tiered Packaging & Feature Gating
subtopics.focus: Fencing off advanced features (SSO, audit logs) for enterprise tier, basic tier limits.
